authority_boundary: Source registry for validator.microcosm.axiom_support_cover domain-scope ordering; it classifies only local declared obligation-domain reach from bound witness material and does not certify fixture, endpoint, organ-local, public-copy, or substrate-general proof.

declared_obligation_domain_only.meaning: The evaluator can classify only the declared obligation domain; no bound witness material is present.
declared_obligation_domain_only.claim_effect: Classifies local declaration only; it cannot witness support.

declared_obligation_domain_with_bound_wi.meaning: The obligation binds local witness material, but the domain remains the declared obligation slice.
declared_obligation_domain_with_bound_wi.claim_effect: Classifies local obligation-domain reach only; it cannot promote local or endpoint evidence to a substrate-general proof.

non_laundering_rules: Domain-scope classification is not substrate-general proof, release authority, public-readiness authority, or policy approval.
Fixture, endpoint, organ-local, and public-copy coverage cannot become domain-general proof through this component.
Generated support-cover output and generated doctrine-lattice projections are never evidence for this registry.
A higher domain-scope class cannot raise an axiom above the meet of positive support and anti-axiom rejection mapping.
unknown_policy: If a computed domain-scope value is outside this source registry, the validator emits unknown_domain_scope_not_in_source_order rather than support.
anti_claims: This registry makes local domain boundaries computed; it does not make any axiom substrate-general.
This registry does not resolve freshness_state.
This registry does not verify exact_obligation_rejection or subsumes_obligation mapping.
